productDisplayName: Puma Men Jago Ripstop White Sports Shoes
description: Round toed sneakers, has a textured, synthetic upper with overlays,  foam stripes on the sides, branding on the upper, perforations at the heel collar and reinforced overlay at the heel collarCentral lace-up fasteningPadded inner and tongue with branding on itCushioned footbed  Durable TPU outsole with honeycomb patterned lugs on the forefoot, curved midfoot with a air unit at the upraised, decoupled heel and herringbone patterned lugs on the heelWarranty: 3 months for manufacturing defect only
